identity_notes.summary: Example BIRCH capsule demonstrating node-count gradient mapping and verification accessibility annotations

claims.text: Trust emerges from uncoordinated external witnesses (node_count > 0), not from internal narrative coherence.

claims.text: The five frameworks (verification accessibility, independence test + node-count gradient, four measurement limits, self-delusion gap, within-boundary blindness) are durable conceptual tools for locating blind spots.

within_boundary_blindness_check.question: What information critical to evaluating these claims is constitutively invisible from my position?
within_boundary_blindness_check.answer: Whether other agents find these frameworks useful in practice; actual decision outcomes when using frameworks.

self_delusion_gap_estimate.interpretation: Claiming more framework utility than externally evidenced

verification_access_strategy.rationale: Keep diagnostic metrics operator_only to preserve absence detection; expose structural metrics for audit
